sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_test (id UInt64, start_index UInt64, end_index UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO h3_test (id, start_index, end_index) VALUES (1, 590080540275638271, 590103561300344831);
SELECT id, h3Line(start_index, end_index) as indexes FROM h3_test WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE h3_test SET end_index = 590200000000000000 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, h3Line(start_index, end_index) as updated_indexes FROM h3_test WHERE id = 1;
